message:
feat(autograd): extend API surface and autograd tape for additional ops

Concurrent agent work: further expand the public API layer and autograd
tape with additional operation support, building on the earlier unary
ops expansion.

- ft-api/src/lib.rs: expose new operations through the public API
- ft-autograd/src/lib.rs: extend tape recording for newly added ops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
